name: Acid
short_description: Throwable vial dealing 2d6 Acid damage on a failed DC 8+Dex+PB save.
full_description:
# Acid

*Adventuring Gear*

- **Cost:** 25 GP
- **Weight:** 1 lb.

When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Alchemist's Fire
short_description: Throwable flask dealing 1d4 Fire damage and igniting the target on a failed save.
full_description:
# Alchemist's Fire

*Adventuring Gear*

- **Cost:** 50 GP
- **Weight:** 1 lb.

When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. name: Spell Scroll
short_description: A magic item bearing the words of a single spell, determined by the scroll's creator.
full_description:
# Spell Scroll

*Adventuring Gear (Magic Item)*

A Spell Scroll (Cantrip) costs 30 GP. A Spell Scroll (Level 1) costs 50 GP.

A Spell Scroll bears the words of a cantrip or level 1 spell, respectively, determined by the scroll's creator. If the spell is on your class's spell list, you can read the scroll and cast the spell using its normal casting time and without providing any Material components. If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll, the spell save DC is 13, and the attack bonus is +5. The scroll disintegrates when the casting is completed.

*Weapon (Any Ammunition), Uncommon*

You have a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

short_description: Weapon (Any Ammunition), Very Rare. Slays creatures of a particular type with 6d10 extra Force damage on failed DC 17 Con save.
full_description:
# Ammunition of Slaying

*Weapon (Any Ammunition), Very Rare*

This magic ammunition is meant to slay creatures of a particular type. If a creature of that type takes damage from the ammunition, the creature makes a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking an extra 6d10 Force damage on a failed save or half as much extra damage on a successful one. After dealing its extra damage to a creature, the ammunition becomes nonmagical.

---

name: Amulet of the Planes
short_description: Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Cast Plane Shift to a familiar location on the DC 15 Arcana check.
full_description:
# Amulet of the Planes

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this amulet, you can take a Magic action to name a location that you are familiar with on another plane of existence. Then make a DC 15 Intelligence (Arcana) check. On a successful check, you cast Plane Shift. On a failed check, you and each creature and object within 15 feet of you travel to a random destination.

name: Animated Shield
short_description: Armor (Shield), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Animate the Shield to hover and protect you for 1 minute as a Bonus Action.
full_description:
# Animated Shield

*Armor (Shield), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While holding this Shield, you can take a Bonus Action to cause it to animate. The Shield leaps into the air and hovers in your space to protect you as if you were wielding it, leaving your hands free. The Shield remains animate for 1 minute, until you take a Bonus Action to end this effect, or until you die or have the Incapacitated condition.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Apparatus of the Crab
short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary. Iron barrel transforming into a giant lobster-shaped vehicle. AC 20, HP 200, Speed 30, Swim 30.
full_description:
# Apparatus of the Crab

*Wondrous Item, Legendary*

This item first appears to be a sealed iron barrel weighing 500 pounds. The barrel has a hidden catch (DC 20 Investigation). Inside are ten levers. When certain levers are used, the apparatus transforms to resemble a giant lobster.

**Stats:** AC 20; HP 200; Speed 30 ft., Swim 30 ft.; Immunity to Poison and Psychic damage.

The apparatus requires one pilot. It floats on water and can dive to 900 feet. Below that, the vehicle takes 2d6 Bludgeoning damage each minute from pressure.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Armor of Invulnerability
short_description: Armor (Plate Armor), Legendary (Requires Attunement). Resistance to Bludgeoning/Piercing/Slashing damage. Metal Shell grants Immunity once per dawn.
full_description:
# Armor of Invulnerability

*Armor (Plate Armor), Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

You have Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage while you wear this armor.

***Metal Shell.*** You can take a Magic action to give yourself Immunity to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage for 10 minutes or until you are no longer wearing the armor. Once this property is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. short_description: Armor (Any Light, Medium, or Heavy), Rare (Requires Attunement). Resistance to one type of damage chosen at creation.
full_description:
# Armor of Resistance

*Armor (Any Light, Medium, or Heavy), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You have Resistance to one type of damage while you wear this armor. The GM chooses the type or determines it randomly: Acid, Cold, Fire, Force, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, or Thunder.

*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Armor of Vulnerability
short_description: Armor (Any Light, Medium, or Heavy), Rare (Requires Attunement). Cursed. Resistance to one damage type and Vulnerability to two.
full_description:
# Armor of Vulnerability

*Armor (Any Light, Medium, or Heavy), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this armor, you have Resistance to one of the following damage types: Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing.

***Curse.*** This armor is cursed, a fact revealed only when *Identify* is cast or you attune to it. Attuning to the armor curses you until you are targeted by *Remove Curse*. While cursed, you have Vulnerability to two of the three damage types associated with the armor.

---

name: Arrow-Catching Shield
short_description: Armor (Shield), Rare (Requires Attunement). +2 AC against ranged attack rolls. Take a Reaction to become target of ranged attack against ally within 5 feet.
full_description:
# Arrow-Catching Shield

*Armor (Shield), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class against ranged attack rolls while you wield this Shield. This bonus is in addition to the Shield's normal bonus to AC.

Whenever an attacker makes a ranged attack roll against a target within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to become the target of the attack instead.

---

name: Bag of Beans
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare. 3d4 magical beans; planted, each produces a wild magical effect.
full_description:
# Bag of Beans

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

This heavy cloth bag contains 3d4 dry beans when found. If you dump one or more beans out of the bag, they explode in a 10-foot-radius Sphere centered on them. All the dumped beans are destroyed in the explosion, and each creature in the Sphere, including you, makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d4 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

If you remove a bean from the bag, plant it in dirt or sand, and then water it, the bean disappears and 1 minute later produces an effect from the ground where it was planted (random table).

name: Bag of Devouring
short_description: Wondrous Item, Very Rare. Resembles a Bag of Holding but devours living matter; 50% chance to pull creatures inside.
full_description:
# Bag of Devouring

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare*

This bag resembles a Bag of Holding but is a feeding orifice for a gigantic extradimensional creature. Animal or vegetable matter wholly placed in the bag is devoured. When part of a living creature is placed in the bag, there is a 50 percent chance that the creature is pulled inside.

If the bag is pierced or torn, it is destroyed, and anything contained within it is transported to a random location on the Astral Plane.

name: Bag of Holding
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Inside space holds up to 500 lb. or 64 cubic feet; bag itself weighs 5 lb.
full_description:
# Bag of Holding

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions, roughly 2 feet square and 4 feet deep on the inside. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. The bag weighs 5 pounds, regardless of its contents.

If the bag is overloaded, pierced, or torn, it is destroyed. If turned inside out, its contents spill forth unharmed. The bag holds enough air for 10 minutes of breathing.

name: Bag of Tricks
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Pull a fuzzy object that transforms into a friendly creature; 3 times per day.
full_description:
# Bag of Tricks

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This bag made from gray, rust, or tan cloth appears empty. As a Magic action, you can pull the fuzzy object from the bag and throw it up to 20 feet. When the object lands, it transforms into a creature you determine by rolling on the table corresponding to the bag's color.

The creature is Friendly to you and your allies. Once three fuzzy objects have been pulled from the bag, the bag can't be used again until the next dawn.

---

name: Bead of Force
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare. Thrown bead explodes in 10-foot Sphere dealing 5d4 Force damage; traps creatures inside sphere.
full_description:
# Bead of Force

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

This small black sphere measures 3/4 of an inch in diameter and weighs an ounce. Typically, 1d4 + 4 Beads of Force are found together.

You can take a Magic action to throw the bead up to 60 feet. The bead explodes in a 10-foot-radius Sphere on impact and is destroyed. Each creature in the Sphere must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 5d4 Force damage. A sphere of transparent force then encloses the area for 1 minute, trapping creatures that failed the save inside.

full_description:
# Belt of Dwarvenkind

*Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this belt, you gain the following benefits:

- **Dwarvish.** You know Dwarvish.
- **Friend of Dwarvenkind.** Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to interact with dwarves and duergar.
- **Toughness.** Your Constitution increases by 2, to a maximum of 20.

50 percent chance each day at dawn of growing a full beard. If not a dwarf or duergar, you also gain: Darkvision 60 ft. and Resistance to Poison damage.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rarity Varies (Requires Attunement). Strength changes to a giant's score (21-29 based on type).
full_description:
# Belt of Giant Strength

*Wondrous Item, Rarity Varies (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this belt, your Strength changes to a score granted by the belt. The type of giant determines the score:

- **Hill (Rare):** Str 21
- **Frost/Stone (Very Rare):** Str 23
- **Fire (Very Rare):** Str 25
- **Cloud (Legendary):** Str 27
- **Storm (Legendary):** Str 29

The item has no effect if your Strength is equal to or greater than the belt's score.

short_description: Weapon (Battleaxe, Greataxe, or Halberd), Rare (Requires Attunement). +1 to attack/damage. Cursed: hp max +1 per level, may go berserk.
full_description:
# Berserker Axe

*Weapon (Battleaxe, Greataxe, or Halberd), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While attuned, your Hit Point maximum increases by 1 for each level you have attained.

***Curse.*** This weapon is cursed. While cursed, you are unwilling to part with the weapon and have Disadvantage on attack rolls with other weapons. When another creature damages you while you hold the weapon, you must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or go berserk.

This wooden broom functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and take a Magic action to make it hover beneath you, at which point it can be ridden in the air. full_description:
# Candle of Invocation

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This candle's magic is activated when the candle is lit (Magic action). After burning for 4 hours, the candle is destroyed.

While lit, the candle sheds Dim Light in a 30-foot radius. A creature in that light has Advantage on D20 Tests. A Cleric or Druid in the light can cast level 1 spells they have prepared without expending spell slots. When you light the candle for the first time, you can cast *Gate* with it (destroys the candle).

While touching this crystal orb, you can cast *Scrying* (save DC 17) with it. In addition, you can cast *Detect Thoughts* (save DC 17) targeting creatures you can see within 30 feet of the spell's sensor.

*Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

*Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

name: Cube of Force
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement). 10 charges; cast Mage Armor, Shield, Tiny Hut, Private Sanctum, Resilient Sphere, or Wall of Force.
full_description:
# Cube of Force

*Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This cube has 10 charges. You can press one of its faces and expend charges to cast the associated spell (save DC 17):

- Mage Armor (1)
- Shield (1)
- Tiny Hut (3)
- Private Sanctum (4)
- Resilient Sphere (4)
- Wall of Force (5)

Regains 1d6 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Cubic Gate
short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary. 3 charges. Cast Gate or Plane Shift to planes keyed to each side of the cube.
full_description:
# Cubic Gate

*Wondrous Item, Legendary*

This cube is 3 inches across and radiates palpable magical energy. The six sides are each keyed to a different plane of existence. The cube has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

- **Gate.** Press one side once: cast *Gate*, opening a portal to that side's plane.
- **Plane Shift.** Press a side twice: cast *Plane Shift*, transporting the targets to that side's plane.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Dagger of Venom
short_description: Weapon (Dagger), Rare. +1 to attack/damage. Bonus Action to coat blade in poison for 1 min: 2d10 Poison + Poisoned (DC 15 Con).
full_description:
# Dagger of Venom

*Weapon (Dagger), Rare*

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

You can take a Bonus Action to magically coat the blade with poison. The poison remains for 1 minute or until an attack using this weapon hits a creature. That creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 2d10 Poison damage and have the Poisoned condition for 1 minute. Once used, can't be used again until the next dawn.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Dancing Sword
short_description: Weapon (Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, or Shortsword), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Bonus Action to toss; hovers and attacks for up to 4 attacks.
full_description:
# Dancing Sword

*Weapon (Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, or Shortsword), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You can take a Bonus Action to toss this magic weapon into the air. The weapon hovers, flies up to 30 feet, and attacks one creature of your choice within 5 feet of it. The weapon uses your attack roll and adds your ability modifier to damage rolls.

After the hovering weapon attacks for the fourth time, it flies back to you. While hovering, you can use a Bonus Action to move it 30 feet.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Decanter of Endless Water
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Stoppered flask producing Splash (1 gal), Fountain (5 gal), or Geyser (30 gal in a Line).
full_description:
# Decanter of Endless Water

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

You can take a Magic action to remove the stopper and issue one of three command words, producing fresh or salt water:

- **Splash.** 1 gallon.
- **Fountain.** 5 gallons.
- **Geyser.** 30 gallons in a Line 30 feet long and 1 foot wide. A creature in the Line makes a DC 13 Str save or takes 1d4 Bludgeoning damage and falls Prone.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Deck of Illusions
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Box of 34 cards; draw one and throw to create an illusion of a creature.
full_description:
# Deck of Illusions

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This box contains a set of cards. A full deck has 34 cards: 32 depicting specific creatures and two with a mirrored surface. The magic of the deck functions only if its cards are drawn at random.

As a Magic action, you can draw a random card and throw it to the ground within 30 feet. An illusion of a creature forms and remains until dispelled. The illusion looks and behaves like a real creature except it can do no harm. DC 15 Investigation reveals it as an illusion.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Defender
short_description: Weapon (Any Melee Weapon), Legendary (Requires Attunement). +3 to attack/damage; transfer some/all bonus to AC.
full_description:
# Defender

*Weapon (Any Melee Weapon), Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

The first time you attack with the weapon on each of your turns, you can transfer some or all of the weapon's bonus to your Armor Class. The adjusted bonuses remain in effect until the start of your next turn, although you must hold the weapon to gain a bonus to AC from it.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Demon Armor
short_description: Armor (Any Light, Medium, or Heavy), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Cursed. +1 AC, know Abyssal; clawed gauntlets deal 1d8 Slashing Unarmed Strikes with +1.
full_description:
# Demon Armor

*Armor (Any Light, Medium, or Heavy), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this armor, you gain +1 AC and you know Abyssal. The armor's clawed gauntlets allow your Unarmed Strikes to deal 1d8 Slashing damage with +1 to attack and damage.

***Curse.*** Once donned, you can't doff it unless targeted by *Remove Curse*. While wearing, Disadvantage on attack rolls against demons and saves against their spells/abilities.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Dimensional Shackles
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare. Shackles preventing extradimensional movement; DC 30 Athletics check to break free.
full_description:
# Dimensional Shackles

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

You can take a Utilize action to place these shackles on an Incapacitated creature (Small to Large). They prevent any method of extradimensional movement, including teleportation or planar travel.

The bound creature can attempt a DC 30 Strength (Athletics) check once every 30 days to break free.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Dragon Orb
short_description: Wondrous Item, Artifact (Requires Attunement). DC 15 Charisma save on attune; spells include Cure Wounds, Daylight, Death Ward, Detect Magic, Scrying.
full_description:
# Dragon Orb

*Wondrous Item, Artifact (Requires Attunement)*

An orb is an etched crystal globe about 10 inches in diameter. While attuned, you can peer into the orb's depths (Magic action). Make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be Charmed by the orb.

**Spells:** The orb has 7 charges and regains 1d4+3 daily at dawn. Cast from: Cure Wounds (level 9, 4 charges), Daylight (1), Death Ward (2), Detect Magic (0), Scrying (3, DC 18).

***Call Dragons.*** Magic action to issue a 40-mile telepathic call to chromatic dragons.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Dragon Scale Mail
short_description: Armor (Scale Mail), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). +1 AC, Advantage on saves vs. dragon breath, Resistance to one type based on dragon.
full_description:
# Dragon Scale Mail

*Armor (Scale Mail), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this armor, you gain +1 AC, Advantage on saves vs. breath weapons of Dragons, and Resistance to one damage type based on the dragon (Black/Copper: Acid; Blue/Bronze: Lightning; Brass/Gold/Red: Fire; Green: Poison; Silver/White: Cold).

Additionally, you can focus your senses to find the closest dragon of the same type within 30 miles (once per dawn).

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. full_description:
# Dragon Slayer

*Weapon (Any Simple or Martial), Rare*

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The weapon deals an extra 3d6 damage of the weapon's type if the target is a Dragon.

*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Dust of Disappearance
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Throw to grant Invisible condition for 2d4 minutes to creatures within 10-foot Emanation.
full_description:
# Dust of Disappearance

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This powder resembles fine sand. When you take a Utilize action to throw the dust into the air, you and each creature and object within a 10-foot Emanation gain the Invisible condition for 2d4 minutes. The duration is the same for all subjects, and the dust is consumed when its magic takes effect. The Invisible condition ends on a creature when it makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Dust of Dryness
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Remove a 15-foot Cube of water; against a water Elemental, 10d6 Necrotic damage on failed DC 13 Con save.
full_description:
# Dust of Dryness

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This small packet contains 1d6+4 pinches of dust. As a Utilize action, you can sprinkle a pinch of dust over water, turning up to a 15-foot Cube of water into a marble-sized pellet. A creature can smash the pellet to release the water.

Also effective on creatures composed mostly of water (e.g., Water Elemental): DC 13 Con save, 10d6 Necrotic damage on failed save.

---

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Throw to inflict Incapacitated and Suffocating on failed DC 15 Con save.
full_description:
# Dust of Sneezing and Choking

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

Found in a small container, this powder resembles *Dust of Disappearance*. As a Utilize action, throw the dust into the air, forcing each creature within a 30-foot Emanation to make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. Constructs, Elementals, Oozes, Plants, and Undead automatically succeed.

On a failed save, a creature begins sneezing uncontrollably; it has the Incapacitated condition and is suffocating. It can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns.

---

While wearing this armor, you gain a +2 bonus to Armor Class. In addition, if an effect moves you against your will along the ground, you can take a Reaction to reduce the distance you are moved by up to 10 feet.

short_description: Weapon (Warhammer), Very Rare (Requires Attunement by a Dwarf or wearer of Belt of Dwarvenkind). +3 to attack/damage; Thrown 20/60; extra 1d8 (or 2d8 vs Giants).
full_description:
# Dwarven Thrower

*Weapon (Warhammer), Very Rare (Requires Attunement by a Dwarf or a Creature Attuned to a Belt of Dwarvenkind)*

You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. It has the Thrown property (normal range 20, long range 60). When you hit with a ranged attack using this weapon, it deals an extra 1d8 Force damage, or an extra 2d8 Force damage if the target is a Giant. Immediately after, the weapon flies back to your hand.

name: Efficient Quiver
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Three compartments holding ammunition, javelins/spears, and long objects extradimensionally.
full_description:
# Efficient Quiver

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

Each of the quiver's three compartments connects to an extradimensional space. The shortest compartment can hold up to 60 Arrows, Bolts, or similar objects. The mid-size compartment holds up to 18 Javelins or similar objects. The longest compartment holds up to 6 long objects, such as bows, Quarterstaffs, or Spears. The quiver weighs 2 pounds regardless of contents.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Very Rare. Open to release an Efreeti. Effect varies by 1d10 result on first opening.
full_description:
# Efreeti Bottle

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare*

When you take a Magic action to remove the stopper of this painted brass bottle, a cloud of thick smoke flows out, and an Efreeti appears within 30 feet. Roll 1d10 on the first opening to determine effect: 1 (attacks for 5 rounds then leaves), 2-9 (obeys for 1 hour, three uses), 10 (casts *Wish* once).

full_description:
# Elemental Gem

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you take a Utilize action to break the gem, an elemental is summoned for 1 hour. The type of gem determines the elemental: Blue sapphire (Air), Emerald (Water), Red corundum (Fire), Yellow diamond (Earth).

short_description: Potion, Rare. Drink to cure all magical contagions and end Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, and Poisoned conditions.

# Elixir of Health

*Potion, Rare*

When you drink this potion, you are cured of all magical contagions. In addition, the following conditions end on you: Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, and Poisoned.

# Elven Chain

*Armor (Chain Mail or Chain Shirt), Rare*

You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class while you wear this armor. You are considered trained with this armor even if you lack training with Medium or Heavy armor.

name: Energy Bow
short_description: Weapon (Longbow or Shortbow), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). +1 attack/damage. Magic arrows; sheds Bright Light. Arrow of Restraint, Arrow of Transport, Energy Ladder properties.
full_description:
# Energy Bow

*Weapon (Longbow or Shortbow), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon, which has no string. Each time you pull your arm back, a magical Force arrow appears. Arrows deal Force damage instead of Piercing and disappear after hit/miss. Until disappearance, arrow emits Bright Light in 20-ft radius and Dim Light 20 more.

Properties: Arrow of Restraint (DC 15 Str save vs. Restrained); Arrow of Transport (teleport a willing creature or unattended object); Energy Ladder (form 60-foot magic ladder).

full_description:
# Eversmoking Bottle

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

As a Magic action, you can open or close this bottle. Opening releases thick smoke that fills a 60-foot Emanation, Heavily Obscuring the area. Each minute open, the size increases by 10 feet up to 120 feet. Closing fixes the cloud until it disperses after 10 minutes.

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon (Requires Attunement)*

These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. They have 3 charges. While wearing them, you can expend 1 or more charges to cast *Charm Person* (save DC 13). For 1 charge, you cast the level 1 version; increase the spell's level by one for each additional charge.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Rarity Varies. Single-use feather with varied effect: Anchor, Bird, Fan, Swan boat, Tree, Whip.
full_description:
# Feather Token

*Wondrous Item, Rarity Varies*

This object looks like a feather. Single-use effects:

- **Anchor (Uncommon):** Vessel can't be moved for 24 hours.
- **Bird (Rare):** Creates a Roc-statted bird that carries 500 lb. up to 16 mph.
- **Fan (Uncommon):** Wind fills sails for 8 hours.
- **Swan Boat (Rare):** 50x20 ft. swan boat moves 6 mph for 24 hours.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rarity Varies. Statuette that becomes a living creature on command (Bronze Griffon, Ebony Fly, Golden Lions, Ivory Goats, Marble Elephant, Obsidian Steed, Onyx Dog, Serpentine Owl, Silver Raven).
full_description:
# Figurine of Wondrous Power

*Wondrous Item, Rarity Varies*

A Figurine of Wondrous Power is a statuette small enough to fit in a pocket. As a Magic action, throw the figurine to a point within 60 feet to transform it into a living creature.

**Types:**
- Bronze Griffon (Rare): Griffon for 6 hours
- Ebony Fly (Rare): Giant Fly for 12 hours
- Golden Lions (Rare): Pair of Lions for 1 hour
- Ivory Goats (Rare): Three variants (Terror, Traveling, Travail)
- Marble Elephant (Rare): Elephant for 24 hours
- Obsidian Steed (Very Rare): Nightmare for 24 hours
- Onyx Dog (Rare): Mastiff with Int 8 for 6 hours
- Serpentine Owl (Rare): Giant Owl for 8 hours
- Silver Raven (Uncommon): Raven for 12 hours

name: Flame Tongue
short_description: Weapon (Any Melee Weapon), Rare (Requires Attunement). Engulf weapon in flames; extra 2d6 Fire damage on hit.
full_description:
# Flame Tongue

*Weapon (Any Melee Weapon), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While holding this magic weapon, you can take a Bonus Action and speak a command word to cause flames to engulf the damage-dealing part of the weapon, shedding Bright Light in a 40-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 40 feet. While the weapon is ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 Fire damage on a hit. The flames last until you take a Bonus Action to issue the command again or until you drop, stow, or sheathe the weapon.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare. Wooden box that transforms into a Rowboat or Keelboat by command word.
full_description:
# Folding Boat

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

This object appears as a wooden box that measures 12 inches long, 6 inches wide, and 6 inches deep. It weighs 4 pounds and floats. Three command words:

- **First:** Unfolds into a Rowboat.
- **Second:** Unfolds into a Keelboat.
- **Third:** Folds back into a box.

short_description: Weapon (Glaive, Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, or Shortsword), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Extra 1d6 Cold damage; Fire Resistance; extinguish nonmagical flames within 30 ft.
full_description:
# Frost Brand

*Weapon (Glaive, Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, or Shortsword), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

When you hit with an attack roll using this magic weapon, the target takes an extra 1d6 Cold damage. While you hold the weapon, you have Resistance to Fire damage.

In freezing temperatures, the weapon sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

When you draw this weapon, you can extinguish all nonmagical flames within 30 feet of yourself (once per hour).

full_description:
# Gem of Brightness

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This prism has 50 charges. Three command words:

- **First:** Sheds Bright Light 30-ft radius and Dim Light 30 feet more (no charge expended).
- **Second (1 charge):** Brilliant beam at one creature within 60 feet; DC 15 Con save or Blinded for 1 minute.
- **Third (5 charges):** 30-foot Cone of intense light; same effect as second.

Gem becomes nonmagical when all charges expended.

This backpack has a central pouch and two side pouches, each an extradimensional space. Each side pouch holds up to 80 pounds of material, not exceeding 25 cubic feet. The central pouch holds up to 500 pounds, not exceeding 64 cubic feet. The haversack always weighs 5 pounds.

full_description:
# Holy Avenger

*Weapon (Any Simple or Martial), Legendary (Requires Attunement by a Paladin)*

You gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. When you hit a Fiend or an Undead with it, that creature takes an extra 2d10 Radiant damage.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare. Thunderous blast in 30-foot Cone; DC 15 Con save or 5d8 Thunder and Deafened.
full_description:
# Horn of Blasting

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

You can take a Magic action to blow the horn, which emits a thunderous blast in a 30-foot Cone audible 600 feet. Each creature in the Cone makes a DC 15 Con save: on a failure, 5d8 Thunder damage and Deafened 1 minute; on a success, half damage. Glass/crystal objects in Cone not worn or carried take 10d8 Thunder damage.

Each use has a 20 percent chance of exploding, dealing 10d6 Force damage to the user and destroying the horn.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare (Silver/Brass), Very Rare (Bronze), or Legendary (Iron). Summons 2-5 Berserker spirits for 1 hour.
full_description:
# Horn of Valhalla

*Wondrous Item, Rare (Silver or Brass), Very Rare (Bronze), or Legendary (Iron)*

You can take a Magic action to blow this horn. Warrior spirits (Berserker stat block) appear in unoccupied spaces within 60 feet and serve for 1 hour.

**Types:** Silver (2 spirits, no requirement), Brass (3, proficiency with Simple weapons), Bronze (4, training with Medium armor), Iron (5, proficiency with Martial weapons).

If the horn is blown without meeting its requirement, the spirits attack you.

# Horseshoes of a Zephyr

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare*

These horseshoes come in a set of four. While all four are affixed to a horse or similar creature, it floats 4 inches above the ground and can move normally over nonsolid or unstable surfaces. It leaves no tracks and ignores Difficult Terrain. It can travel up to 12 hours a day without gaining Exhaustion.

This iron rod has a button on one end. You can take a Utilize action to press the button, causing the rod to become magically fixed in place. *Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

As a Magic action, place this 1-inch adamantine statuette on the ground and speak a command word to cause it to grow into a square adamantine tower. The tower is 20 feet on a side and 30 feet high, with arrow slits and a battlement atop it. Has 2 floors with ladder/staircase/ramp.

While holding this brass-stoppered iron flask, you can take a Magic action to target a creature within 60 feet. If the flask is empty and the target is native to a plane other than yours, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wis save or be trapped in the flask. The flask can hold only one creature at a time. short_description: Weapon (Javelin), Uncommon. Throw to deal 4d6 Lightning damage in a Line (DC 13 Dex save for half).
full_description:
# Javelin of Lightning

*Weapon (Javelin), Uncommon*

Each time you make an attack roll with this magic weapon and hit, you can have it deal Lightning damage instead of Piercing.

***Lightning Bolt.*** When you throw this weapon at a target within 120 feet, you can forgo the attack roll and turn the weapon into a bolt of lightning. This bolt forms a 5-foot-wide Line. Targets in the Line make DC 13 Dex save, taking 4d6 Lightning (half on success). Weapon reappears in your hand. Once per dawn.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Burns oil; reveals Invisible creatures and objects within 30 feet of Bright Light.
full_description:
# Lantern of Revealing

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

While lit, this hooded lantern burns for 6 hours on 1 pint of oil, shedding Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. Invisible creatures and objects are visible as long as they are in the lantern's Bright Light. You can take a Utilize action to lower the hood, reducing the lantern's light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius.

name: Luck Blade
short_description: Weapon (Glaive, Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, Sickle, or Shortsword), Legendary (Requires Attunement). +1 to attack/damage and saves; Luck reroll; cast Wish (1d3 charges).
full_description:
# Luck Blade

*Weapon (Glaive, Greatsword, Longsword, Rapier, Scimitar, Sickle, or Shortsword), Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. While the weapon is on your person, you also gain a +1 bonus to saving throws.

- **Luck.** Reroll one failed D20 Test (once per dawn).
- **Wish.** 1d3 charges. Expend 1 charge to cast *Wish*. Once per dawn. Loses property when no charges remain.

name: Mace of Disruption
short_description: Weapon (Mace), Rare (Requires Attunement). Extra 2d6 Radiant on Fiend/Undead; destroys ≤25 HP Fiends/Undead on failed DC 15 Wis save.
full_description:
# Mace of Disruption

*Weapon (Mace), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

When you hit a Fiend or an Undead with this magic weapon, that creature takes an extra 2d6 Radiant damage. If the target has 25 Hit Points or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a DC 15 Wis save or be destroyed. On a success, the creature has the Frightened condition until the end of your next turn.

***Light.*** While you hold this weapon, it sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet.

---

full_description:
# Mace of Smiting

*Weapon (Mace), Rare*

You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. The bonus increases to +3 when you use the weapon to attack a Construct.

When you roll a 20 on an attack roll, the target takes an extra 7 Bludgeoning damage, or 14 Bludgeoning damage if it's a Construct. If a Construct has 25 HP or fewer after taking this damage, it is destroyed.

This tome contains information and incantations necessary to make a particular type of golem. To decipher and use the manual, you must be a spellcaster with at least two level 5 spell slots.

This fine wooden box contains 1d4 pots of pigment and a brush. Using the brush and 1 pot of pigment, you can paint any number of three-dimensional objects or terrain features, confined to a 20-foot Cube. Takes 10 minutes and requires Concentration.

No object can have a value greater than 25 GP. Painting energy is harmless. The painted objects and terrain features become real.

*Armor (Any Medium or Heavy, Except Hide Armor), Uncommon*

Mithral is a light, flexible metal. Armor made of this substance can be worn under normal clothes. If the armor normally imposes Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks or has a Strength requirement, the mithral version doesn't.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary. Deck of cards (13 or 22) with powerful effects when drawn (Balance, Comet, Donjon, Euryale, etc.).
full_description:
# Mysterious Deck

*Wondrous Item, Legendary*

Usually found in a box or pouch, this deck contains a number of cards made of ivory or vellum. Most decks have thirteen cards; some have twenty-two.

Before drawing, you must declare how many cards you intend to draw. As soon as you draw a card, its magic takes effect. Each card has a unique, often dramatic effect (Balance, Comet, Donjon, Euryale, Fates, Flames, Fool, Gem, Jester, Key, Knight, Moon, Puzzle, Rogue, Ruin, Sage, Skull, Star, Sun, Talons, Throne, Void).

---

*Weapon (Any Simple or Martial), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

short_description: Weapon (Longbow or Shortbow), Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Declare sworn enemy for 7 days; Advantage and ignore cover; extra 3d6 Piercing.
full_description:
# Oathbow

*Weapon (Longbow or Shortbow), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

When you nock an arrow on this bow, it whispers in Elvish. When you use this weapon to make a ranged attack, you can utter the command word: "Swift death to you who have wronged me." The target becomes your sworn enemy until it dies or until dawn 7 days later.

You have Advantage on ranged attacks against your sworn enemy. Your target gains no benefit from Half/Three-Quarters Cover. No Disadvantage at long range. On hit: extra 3d6 Piercing. Disadvantage on attacks with other weapons.

full_description:
# Ring of Djinni Summoning

*Ring, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this ring, you can take a Magic action to summon a Djinni from the Elemental Plane of Air. The djinni appears in an unoccupied space you choose within 120 feet and remains as long as you maintain Concentration, up to 1 hour. The djinni is Friendly. It can't be summoned again for 24 hours.

full_description:
# Ring of Elemental Command

*Ring, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

Linked to an Elemental Plane (Air, Earth, Fire, or Water). Properties:

- **Elemental Bane.** Advantage on attacks vs Elementals; they have Disadvantage on attacks vs you.
- **Elemental Compulsion.** Compel Elementals within 60 ft (DC 18 Wis save).
- **Elemental Focus.** Plane-specific (Auran/Resist Lightning + Fly; Terran/Resist Acid; Ignan/Immunity Fire; Aquan/Swim 60 + breathe underwater).
- **Spellcasting.** 5 charges, regains 1d4+1 daily.

---

*Ring, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You can cast *Dancing Lights* or *Light* from the ring. The ring has 6 charges and regains 1d6 daily at dawn. Charges:

- **Faerie Fire (1 charge).**
- **Lightning Spheres (2 charges).** Create 1-4 spheres; DC 15 Dex save; damage 4d12-2d4 Lightning.

name: Ring of Spell Storing
short_description: Ring, Rare (Requires Attunement). Stores up to 5 levels of spells; cast spells stored without expending slots.
full_description:
# Ring of Spell Storing

*Ring, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This ring stores spells cast into it, holding them until the attuned wearer uses them. The ring can store up to 5 levels worth of spells at a time. When found, it contains 1d6-1 levels of stored spells.

Any creature can cast a spell of level 1 through 5 into the ring by touching it as the spell is cast. The cast spell uses the slot level, spell save DC, spell attack bonus, and spellcasting ability of the original caster.

---

short_description: Ring, Rare (Requires Attunement). 3 charges; expend 1-3 to make spectral ram attack: +7 to hit, 2d10 Force damage and 5-foot push per charge.
full_description:
# Ring of the Ram

*Ring, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This ring has 3 charges and regains 1d3 daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can take a Magic action to expend 1-3 charges to make a ranged spell attack against one creature within 60 feet. The ring produces a spectral ram's head, attacking with +7 bonus. On hit, for each charge spent, target takes 2d10 Force damage and is pushed 5 feet away.

Alternatively, use charges to break a nonmagical object.

---

*Ring, Uncommon (Requires Attunement)*

If you take Cold damage while wearing this ring, the ring reduces the damage you take by 2d8. In addition, while wearing this ring, you and everything you wear and carry are unharmed by temperatures of 0°F or lower.

name: Ring of X-ray Vision
short_description: Ring, Rare (Requires Attunement). Magic action: X-ray vision 30 feet for 1 minute; risk Exhaustion if used again before Long Rest.
full_description:
# Ring of X-ray Vision

*Ring, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this ring, you can take a Magic action to gain X-ray vision with a range of 30 feet for 1 minute. To you, solid objects within that radius appear transparent. The vision can penetrate 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, or up to 3 feet of wood or dirt. Thicker substances or thin lead blocks the vision.

Using again before Long Rest: DC 15 Con save or 1 Exhaustion level.

---

name: Robe of Eyes
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement). Advantage on Perception checks; Darkvision and Truesight 120 feet.
full_description:
# Robe of Eyes

*Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This robe is adorned with eyelike patterns. While you wear it:

- **All-Around Vision.** Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
- **Special Senses.** Darkvision and Truesight, both with range 120 feet.

***Drawbacks.*** *Light* spell cast on the robe or *Daylight* within 5 feet gives you Blinded condition for 1 minute (DC 11/15 Con save ends).

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Robe of Scintillating Colors
short_description: Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement). 3 charges; expend 1 to make creatures have Disadvantage on attacks vs you; DC 15 Wis or Stunned.
full_description:
# Robe of Scintillating Colors

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This robe has 3 charges and regains 1d3 daily at dawn. While you wear it, you can take a Magic action and expend 1 charge to cause a shifting pattern of dazzling hues until the end of your next turn. The robe sheds Bright Light 30 feet, Dim Light 30 more. Creatures who see you have Disadvantage on attacks against you. Creatures in the Bright Light make DC 15 Wis save or be Stunned until the effect ends.

---

name: Robe of Stars
short_description: Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement). +1 to saving throws; 6 stars cast Magic Missile (level 5); enter Astral Plane.
full_description:
# Robe of Stars

*Wondrous Item, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This robe is embroidered with small white or silver stars. You gain a +1 bonus to saving throws while you wear it.

Six stars are particularly large. While wearing this robe, you can take a Magic action to remove one star and expend it to cast the level 5 version of *Magic Missile*. Stars reappear at dusk daily (1d6 stars).

You can also take a Magic action to enter the Astral Plane along with everything you are wearing and carrying.

---

short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer/Warlock/Wizard). AC 15+Dex; Advantage on saves vs spells; spell save DC and attack bonus +2.
full_description:
# Robe of the Archmagi

*Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard)*

This elegant garment is made from exquisite cloth and adorned with runes. While wearing this robe:

- **Armor.** If you aren't wearing armor, base AC is 15 plus your Dexterity modifier.
- **Magic Resistance.** Advantage on saving throws against spells.
- **War Mage.** Your spell save DC and spell attack bonus each increase by 2.

---

name: Robe of Useful Items
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Patches that detach to become useful objects (Dagger, Mirror, Rope, etc.).
full_description:
# Robe of Useful Items

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This robe has cloth patches of various shapes. While wearing it, you can take a Magic action to detach one patch, causing it to become the object or creature it represents.

**Standard patches:** 2 of each of Bullseye Lantern, Dagger, Mirror, Pole, Rope (coiled), Sack.

Plus 4d4 other patches (e.g., 100 GP bag, silver coffer, iron door, gems, ladder, Riding Horse with Saddle, open pit, Potions of Healing, Rowboat, Spell Scroll, Mastiffs, window, Portable Ram).

---

name: Rod of Absorption
short_description: Rod, Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Reaction to absorb a single-target spell (up to 50 levels); convert to spell slots.
full_description:
# Rod of Absorption

*Rod, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While holding this rod, you can take a Reaction to absorb a spell that is targeting only you. The absorbed spell's effect is canceled, and its energy is stored in the rod. The rod can store up to 50 levels of energy.

If you are a spellcaster, you can convert stored energy into spell slots (max level 5).

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Rod of Alertness
short_description: Rod, Very Rare (Requires Attunement). Advantage on Perception and Initiative; spells; Protective Aura.
full_description:
# Rod of Alertness

*Rod, Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

- **Alertness.** Advantage on Perception checks and Initiative rolls.
- **Spells.** Cast *Detect Evil and Good*, *Detect Magic*, *Detect Poison and Disease*, or *See Invisibility* from the rod.
- **Protective Aura.** Plant haft in ground (Magic action). Rod sheds Bright Light 60 feet, Dim Light 60 more. You and allies in light gain +1 AC and saves and sense Invisible creatures in Bright Light.

---

name: Rod of Lordly Might
short_description: Rod, Legendary. Magic Mace (+3); buttons transform into different weapons/items; Drain Life, Paralyze, Terrify.
full_description:
# Rod of Lordly Might

*Rod, Legendary*

This rod has a flanged head, and it functions as a magic Mace that grants a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. The rod has properties associated with six buttons set in a row along the haft:

- **Button 1.** Fiery Longsword/Shortsword (+2d6 Fire).
- **Button 2.** Magic Battleaxe (+3).
- **Button 3.** Magic Spear (+3).
- **Button 4.** Climbing pole.
- **Button 5.** Battering ram (+10 Athletics).
- **Button 6.** Normal form/magnetic north.

***Drain Life.*** 4d6 Necrotic and recover half. ***Paralyze.*** DC 17 Con save or Paralyzed. ***Terrify.*** DC 17 Wis save or Frightened.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Rod of Resurrection
short_description: Rod, Legendary (Requires Attunement). 5 charges; cast Heal (1 charge) or Resurrection (5 charges).
full_description:
# Rod of Resurrection

*Rod, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

The rod has 5 charges. While holding it, you can cast one of the following spells from it: *Heal* (expends 1 charge) or *Resurrection* (expends 5 charges).

The rod regains 1 expended charge daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll 1d20. On a 1, the rod disappears in a harmless burst of radiance.

short_description: Rod, Rare (Requires Attunement). Command obedience from each creature within 120 feet (DC 15 Wis save or Charmed for 8 hours).
full_description:
# Rod of Rulership

*Rod, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

You can take a Magic action to present the rod and command obedience from each creature of your choice you can see within 120 feet. Each target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for 8 hours. While Charmed, the creature regards you as its trusted leader. Once per dawn.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Rod of Security
short_description: Rod, Very Rare. Transport you and up to 199 willing creatures to a personal demiplane for up to 200 days.
full_description:
# Rod of Security

*Rod, Very Rare*

While holding this rod, you can take a Magic action to activate it. The rod then instantly transports you and up to 199 other willing creatures you can see to a demiplane. There you can choose any form. Visitors regain HP and don't age or need to eat/drink. Up to 200 days divided by number of creatures present. Once used, can't be used again for 10 days.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Rope of Climbing
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. 60-foot rope animates and moves; holds up to 3,000 pounds.
full_description:
# Rope of Climbing

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

This 60-foot length of rope can hold up to 3,000 pounds. While holding one end of the rope, you can take a Magic action to command the other end to animate and move toward a destination, up to the rope's length away. You can tell the rope to fasten itself to an object, unfasten itself, knot/unknot itself, or coil itself.

Rope has AC 20, HP 20, Immunity to Poison/Psychic damage.

---

full_description:
# Rope of Entanglement

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

This rope is 30 feet long. While holding one end, you can take a Magic action to command the other end to dart forward and entangle one creature you can see within 20 feet. The target makes DC 15 Dex save or has the Restrained condition. A Restrained target can attempt a DC 15 Athletics or Acrobatics check to escape.

---

*Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

This beetle-shaped medallion provides three benefits:

- **Defense.** +1 AC.
- **Preservation.** 12 charges. Reaction to expend 1 to turn a failed save against a Necromancy spell or harmful effect from an Undead into a successful one. The scarab crumbles when its last charge is expended.
- **Spell Resistance.** Advantage on saves against spells.

# Sending Stones

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

Sending Stones come in pairs, each carved to match the other. While you touch one stone, you can cast *Sending* from it. The target is the bearer of the other stone. If no creature bears the other stone, you know that fact as soon as you use the stone, and you don't cast the spell. Once cast using either stone, the stones can't be used again until the next dawn.

*Armor (Shield), Rare (Requires Attunement)*

*Armor (Shield), Very Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While holding this Shield, you have a +2 bonus to AC (in addition to normal Shield bonus). Properties:

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon (Requires Attunement)*

While you wear these light shoes, you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. You have a Climb Speed equal to your Speed. The slippers don't allow you to move this way on a slippery surface.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary. Permanent adhesive bond; can only be broken by Universal Solvent, Oil of Etherealness, or Wish.
full_description:
# Sovereign Glue

*Wondrous Item, Legendary*

This viscous, milky-white substance can form a permanent adhesive bond between any two objects. It must be stored in a jar or flask coated inside with *Oil of Slipperiness*. Container holds 1d6+1 ounces. One ounce covers a 1-foot square surface. Applying takes a Utilize action and 1 minute to set. Bond can be broken only by *Universal Solvent*, *Oil of Etherealness*, or a *Wish* spell.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary. 2-foot black sphere; obliterates matter; 8d10 Force damage on contact.
full_description:
# Sphere of Annihilation

*Wondrous Item, Legendary*

This 2-foot-diameter black sphere is a hole in the multiverse, hovering in space. It obliterates all matter it passes through. Anything touching the sphere takes 8d10 Force damage.

***Controlling the Sphere.*** Sphere is stationary unless someone takes control. Within 60 feet, take a Magic action: DC 25 Int (Arcana) check. On success, control until the start of your next turn (can move 5 times Int mod feet).

*Staff, Rare (Requires Attunement by a Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard)*

This staff has 10 charges. While holding the staff, you can use any of its properties:

- **Cast Spell.** Expend 1 charge to cast *Charm Person*, *Command*, or *Comprehend Languages*.
- **Reflect Enchantment.** Reaction to expend 1 charge and turn an Enchantment spell back on its caster.
- **Resist Enchantment.** Turn failed save vs Enchantment into success (once per dawn).

Regains 1d8+2 charges daily.

name: Staff of Fire
short_description: Staff, Very Rare (Requires Attunement by Druid/Sorcerer/Warlock/Wizard). 10 charges; Resistance to Fire; cast Burning Hands, Fireball, Wall of Fire.
full_description:
# Staff of Fire

*Staff, Very Rare (Requires Attunement by a Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard)*

You have Resistance to Fire damage while you hold this staff.

*Staff, Uncommon (Requires Attunement)*

As a Magic action, you can throw this staff so that it lands in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of you, causing the staff to become a Giant Constrictor Snake. The snake is under your control. You can mentally command it (no action). Once reverted to staff form (Bonus Action), can't be used again for 1 hour.

*Staff, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This staff has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare. Summon an Earth Elemental once per dawn.
full_description:
# Stone of Controlling Earth Elementals

*Wondrous Item, Rare*

While touching this 5-pound stone to the ground, you can take a Magic action to summon an Earth Elemental. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space within 30 feet, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you. It disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it. The stone can't be used again until the next dawn.

*Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement by a Cleric or Paladin)*

A Fiend or Undead touching the talisman takes 8d6 Radiant damage and again each turn they end holding it.

- **Holy Symbol.** Use as Holy Symbol; +2 to spell attack rolls.
- **Pure Rebuke.** 7 charges. Expend 1 to open flaming fissure on a creature within 120 feet. DC 20 Dex save. Fiend/Undead has Disadvantage. Failed save: target falls into fissure (destroyed); success: 4d6 Psychic.

*Wondrous Item, Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

While holding or wearing this talisman, you have Advantage on any Intelligence (Arcana) check you make to control a *Sphere of Annihilation*. In addition, when you start your turn in control of a Sphere of Annihilation, you can take a Magic action to try to move it 10 feet plus 10 times your Intelligence modifier feet.

# Vorpal Sword

*Weapon (Glaive, Greatsword, Longsword, or Scimitar), Legendary (Requires Attunement)*

full_description:
# Wand of Fireballs

*Wand, Rare (Requires Attunement by a Spellcaster)*

This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend no more than 3 charges to cast *Fireball* (save DC 15). For 1 charge, you cast the level 3 version. Increase the spell's level by 1 for each additional charge. Regains 1d6+1 daily.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Wand of Paralysis
short_description: Wand, Rare (Requires Attunement by a Spellcaster). 7 charges; cast a thin blue ray to inflict Paralyzed condition (DC 15 Con save).
full_description:
# Wand of Paralysis

*Wand, Rare (Requires Attunement by a Spellcaster)*

This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge causing a thin blue ray to streak from the tip toward a creature within 60 feet. The target makes DC 15 Con save or has the Paralyzed condition for 1 minute. Saves at end of turns to end effect.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Wand of Secrets
short_description: Wand, Uncommon. 3 charges; expend 1 to detect a secret door or trap within 60 feet.
full_description:
# Wand of Secrets

*Wand, Uncommon*

This wand has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge, and if a secret door or trap is within 60 feet of you, the wand pulses and points at the one nearest you.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. name: Wand of Wonder
short_description: Wand, Rare (Requires Attunement). 7 charges; random magical effect from a d100 table (Darkness, Faerie Fire, Fireball, Slow, Stinking Cloud, etc.).
full_description:
# Wand of Wonder

*Wand, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge and choose a point within 120 feet. The location becomes the point of origin for a random spell or effect (d100 table). Spells from the wand have save DC 15. Regains 1d6+1 charges daily.

---

name: Weapon of Warning
short_description: Weapon (Any Simple or Martial), Uncommon (Requires Attunement). Alarm wakes sleepers within 30 feet; Advantage on Initiative.
full_description:
# Weapon of Warning

*Weapon (Any Simple or Martial), Uncommon (Requires Attunement)*

As long as this weapon is within your reach and you are attuned to it, you and allies within 30 feet of you gain the following benefits:

- **Alarm.** Each subject who is sleeping naturally awakens when combat begins.
- **Supernatural Readiness.** Each subject has Advantage on Initiative rolls.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Well of Many Worlds
short_description: Wondrous Item, Legendary. Black cloth that opens a two-way portal to another world or plane.
full_description:
# Well of Many Worlds

*Wondrous Item, Legendary*

This fine black cloth is folded up to the dimensions of a handkerchief. It unfolds into a circular sheet 6 feet in diameter.

You can take a Magic action to unfold the Well and place it on a solid surface, whereupon it forms a two-way, 6-foot-diameter, circular portal to another world or plane. The GM decides where it leads. The portal remains open until closed. Once it opens, it can't do so again for 1d8 hours.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Wind Fan
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon. Cast Gust of Wind (DC 13); 20% cumulative chance of breaking on subsequent uses before dawn.
full_description:
# Wind Fan

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon*

While holding this fan, you can cast *Gust of Wind* (save DC 13) from it. Each subsequent time the fan is used before the next dawn, it has a cumulative 20 percent chance of not working; if the fan fails to work, it tears into useless, nonmagical tatters.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Winged Boots
short_description: Wondrous Item, Uncommon (Requires Attunement). 4 charges; Fly Speed 30 for 1 hour per charge.
full_description:
# Winged Boots

*Wondrous Item, Uncommon (Requires Attunement)*

These boots have 4 charges and regain 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the boots, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge, gaining a Fly Speed of 30 feet for 1 hour. If you are flying when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 feet per round until you land.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd. The SRD 5.2.1 is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License, available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.*

name: Wings of Flying
short_description: Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement). Cloak transforms into wings; Fly Speed 60 for 1 hour. Recharge in 1d12 hours.
full_description:
# Wings of Flying

*Wondrous Item, Rare (Requires Attunement)*

While wearing this cloak, you can take a Magic action to turn the cloak into a pair of wings on your back. The wings last for 1 hour or until you end the effect as a Magic action. The wings give you a Fly Speed of 60 feet. If you are aloft when the wings disappear, you fall. When the wings disappear, you can't use them again for 1d12 hours.

---
*This work includes material from the System Reference Document 5.2.1 ("SRD 5.2.1") by Wizards of the Coast LLC, available at https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd.
